title: Burger King names 2 new agencies following viral Whopper bite moment
summary: Mojo Supermarket, now the chain’s U.S. social AOR, claimed credit for a video swiping at McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski’s awkward Big Arch review.

title: Thinking Machines Lab inks massive compute deal with Nvidia
summary: The multi-year deal involves at least a gigawatt of compute power and also includes a strategic investment from Nvidia.
